lever.name: exact-order row/column macro-panel scheduler
lever.source_change: temporarily grouped bounded MR row-tile bands with bounded NR column-panel bands inside each pc-block
lever.reason_rejected: Matched-worker Criterion intervals overlapped and median speedup missed the bead's >=1.15x target; source was restored.

matched_benchmark.tool: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline

isomorphism.floating_point: candidate preserved the same ascending-k accumulation loop for every output element
isomorphism.tie_breaking: no comparisons or ties in GEMM path
isomorphism.errors: input assertions and panic surface unchanged

next_primitive.name: contiguous-row GEMM microkernel with B superpanel streaming
next_primitive.source: alien-graveyard cache locality and tiled SIMD primitive
next_primitive.constraint: preserve ascending-k accumulation per output; change C traversal to row-contiguous bands and use B superpanels to bound rereads
